---
title: "Sin function Interpolation - Bishop's Deep Learning: Foundations and Concepts"
date: 2025-07-30
description: "The sin function interpolation example from Bishop's Deep Learning book, demonstrating concepts of machine learning."
categories: [html, web]

---
Check out in [this](https://pluto.land/n/chtidu6q) link for more user-friendly experience.
<iframe src="www/sin_func_interpolation.html" style="width:100%;height:700px;border:0"></iframe>
